nasb.text: “The kingdom of heaven is like a treasure hidden in the field, which a man found and hid again; and from joy over it he goes and sells all that he has and buys that field.

esv.text: “The kingdom of heaven     is like treasure hidden in a field, which a man found and covered up. Then in his joy     he goes and sells all that he has and     buys that field.

cnv.text: “天國好像藏在田裡的寶貝，有人發現了，就把它藏起來，高高興興地離去，變賣了他的一切，來買那田地。

ccb.text: “天国就像藏在地里的宝贝，有人发现了，就把它埋好，然后欢然变卖他所有的财产去买那块地。

csbs.text: “天国好比被藏在田里的财宝。有人发现了，就把它再藏起来，然后高高兴兴地去卖掉他所拥有的一切，买下了那块地。
